_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical audiences, including paper writing, conference presentation, and internal briefing formats.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.571), LS-S-004 (LS, cosine: 0.529).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.9/10 (raw 0.285). Shared vocabulary: [non, research, skill]. DCWF-only terms [attributable, conducting] vs WIDAI-only terms [audiences, briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.904, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.044 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (72.3%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in conducting non-attributable research." and "Skill in communicating research findings to both technical and non-technical aud". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.607 > STS 0.285 (gap +0.322). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [non, research, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.1%. Shared tokens: [non, research, skill]. DCWF-only: [attributable, conducting]. WIDAI-only: [audiences, briefing, communicating, conference, findings, formats].
